parameter_notes.static_benchmark.duffing_model.transmon_: Used when static_benchmark.duffing_model.calibration_mode is 'fixed', 'per-flux', 'fitted-static', or 'symbolic-fitted-static'. Ignored for 'analytic-per-flux'.
Used when static_benchmark.duffing_model.calibration_mode is 'fixed', 'per-flux', 'fitted-static', or 'symbolic-fitted-static'. Ignored for 'analytic-per-flux'.
parameter_notes.static_benchmark.duffing_model.symbolic_: Used only when static_benchmark.duffing_model.calibration_mode is 'symbolic-fitted-static'; controls the cosine basis size for the global surrogate.
Used only when static_benchmark.duffing_model.calibration_mode is 'symbolic-fitted-static'; maximum least-squares function evaluations per flux point in the seed fit.
Used only when static_benchmark.duffing_model.calibration_mode is 'symbolic-fitted-static'; maximum least-squares function evaluations for the global symbolic refinement.
Used only when static_benchmark.duffing_model.calibration_mode is 'symbolic-fitted-static'; penalizes deviation from the pointwise seed fit during global refinement.
parameter_notes.circuit_truncation_benchmark.flux_values: Configured flux points over which circuit truncation RMSE is aggregated; include the most sensitive operating regions.
parameter_notes.circuit_truncation_benchmark.circuit_ncu: Circuit-model charge-basis cutoffs swept for static convergence over the configured flux set.
parameter_notes.circuit_truncation_benchmark.circuit_qub: Circuit-model qubit truncated dimensions swept with the coupler truncated dimension fixed at the circuit reference value.
parameter_notes.circuit_truncation_benchmark.circuit_cou: Circuit-model coupler truncated dimensions swept with the qubit truncated dimension fixed at the circuit reference value.
parameter_notes.circuit_truncation_benchmark.circuit_ref: Circuit-model qubit truncated dimension used in the strict static reference point.
Circuit-model coupler truncated dimension used in the strict static reference point.
parameter_notes.duffing_truncation_benchmark.flux_values: Configured flux points over which Duffing truncation RMSE is aggregated; include the most sensitive operating regions.
parameter_notes.duffing_truncation_benchmark.duffing_ncu: Used for all truncation Duffing calibration modes; controls the transmon charge-basis cutoff sweep. For reference-driven modes ('fitted-static' and 'symbolic-fitted-static'), a separate reference fit is run for each swept ncut.
parameter_notes.duffing_truncation_benchmark.duffing_tru: Used for all truncation Duffing calibration modes except 'analytic-per-flux'; clipped per point to min(duffing_truncated_dim, 2*ncut+1).
parameter_notes.duffing_truncation_benchmark.duffing_hil: Duffing-model qubit Hilbert dimensions swept with the coupler Hilbert dimension fixed at static_benchmark.duffing_model.hilbert_truncation.nlevels_coupler.
Duffing-model coupler Hilbert dimensions swept with the qubit Hilbert dimension fixed at static_benchmark.duffing_model.hilbert_truncation.nlevels_qubit.
parameter_notes.duffing_truncation_benchmark.circuit_ref: Circuit-model qubit truncated dimension used in the strict static reference point.
Circuit-model coupler truncated dimension used in the strict static reference point.
parameter_notes.cz_benchmark.scan_dt_ns: Used only when cz_benchmark.enable_hold_time_scan is true.
parameter_notes.cz_benchmark.scan_max_hold_ns: Used only when cz_benchmark.enable_hold_time_scan is true.
parameter_notes.cz_benchmark.scan_leakage_penalty: Used only when cz_benchmark.enable_hold_time_scan is true.
parameter_notes.cz_benchmark.total_time_ns: Mutually exclusive with hold_time_ns. Used only when enable_hold_time_scan is false; implies hold_time_ns = total_time_ns - 2*ramp_time_ns.
parameter_notes.cz_benchmark.hold_time_ns: Mutually exclusive with total_time_ns. Used only when enable_hold_time_scan is false.
parameter_notes.runtime_benchmark.qubit_truncation_value: Propagated qubit truncations swept for both models during the CZ runtime benchmark: Duffing hilbert_truncation.nlevels_qubit and circuit_model.hilbert_truncation.q0_truncated_dim/q1_truncated_dim are all set to the same value at each sweep point.
parameter_notes.runtime_benchmark.duffing_calibration_mo: Duffing calibration mode used only for the runtime benchmark sweep; may differ from static_benchmark.duffing_model.calibration_mode.
parameter_notes.runtime_benchmark.repeats: How many times to rerun each qubit-truncation point before aggregating median/std runtimes.
parameter_notes.runtime_benchmark.hold_time_ns: Optional fixed CZ hold time in ns used for every qubit-truncation point in the runtime benchmark. If omitted, a single reference hold time is resolved once and then reused across the sweep.
parameter_notes.rx_benchmark.drive_frequency: Drive frequency in GHz used in the rotating-frame/RWA benchmark Hamiltonian.
parameter_notes.rx_benchmark.drive_amplitude: On-resonance drive amplitude in GHz for the shared microwave envelope.
parameter_notes.rx_benchmark.drive_phase_rad: Krantz et al. 2019 quadrature convention: phase 0 gives X, phase pi/2 gives Y.
parameter_notes.rx_benchmark.dt_ns: Piecewise-constant integration step in ns for the drive envelope.
parameter_notes.rx_benchmark.rise_time_ns: Cosine-edge rise/fall duration in ns; total_time_ns must be >= 2 * rise_time_ns.
